questions.q: Which conclusion best follows from accepting the Quran but neglecting Hadith and Sunnah in practice?
questions.urdu: قرآن کو ماننے لیکن عملی زندگی میں حدیث اور سنت کو نظر انداز کرنے سے کون سا نتیجہ سب سے بہتر طور پر سامنے آتا ہے؟
options: Religion remains intact because general principles are enough without prophetic explanation
Core teachings may be affirmed in theory while their practical form becomes unstable or distorted
Faith becomes simpler because secondary sources often create unnecessary detail
questions.explanation: Last verified on 08-05-2026

questions.q: Which reading of the Seerat best explains why the Prophet's leadership produced durable reform instead of short-term compliance?
questions.urdu: سیرتِ نبویؐ کی کون سی تشریح سب سے بہتر وضاحت کرتی ہے کہ نبی کریم ﷺ کی قیادت نے عارضی اطاعت کے بجائے دیرپا اصلاح کیوں پیدا کی؟
options: It relied mainly on fear, thereby ensuring immediate obedience
It preferred symbolic acts over institution-building and training
It united truth, character, and wisdom in a way that reshaped both persons and society
questions.explanation: Last verified on 08-05-2026

questions.q: Which situation most clearly proves that the spirit of worship has not yet transformed the worshipper?
questions.urdu: کون سی صورتحال سب سے واضح طور پر ثابت کرتی ہے کہ عبادت کی روح نے ابھی تک عبادت کرنے والے کی شخصیت کو تبدیل نہیں کیا؟
options: A person fasts and also learns patience under provocation
A person becomes more punctual in prayer and more careful with others' rights
A person is regular in ritual observance but remains exploitative in transactions
questions.explanation: Last verified on 08-05-2026

questions.q: A person accepts Allah verbally but lives as if power, success, and security are ultimately controlled by worldly structures alone. Which evaluation is most accurate?
questions.urdu: ایک شخص زبان سے اللہ پر ایمان کا اقرار کرتا ہے لیکن عملی زندگی میں ایسے رہتا ہے جیسے طاقت، کامیابی اور حفاظت صرف دنیاوی نظاموں کے ہاتھ میں ہو۔ سب سے درست تجزیہ کیا ہے؟
options: The case proves belief is purely private and unrelated to action
The person has strengthened faith through realism
The case shows a tension between professed faith and functional dependence
questions.explanation: Last verified on 08-05-2026

questions.q: Which example most accurately illustrates the Quran's merit as a criterion between right and wrong?
questions.urdu: کون سی مثال قرآن کے حق اور باطل میں فرق کرنے والے معیار ہونے کو سب سے بہتر ظاہر کرتی ہے؟
options: Treating recitation as sufficient proof of righteousness regardless of behavior
Using selected verses to confirm an opinion already formed by personal interest
Allowing Quranic standards to override emotional bias when judging a dispute
questions.explanation: Last verified on 08-05-2026

questions.q: Which statement best reflects the Quran's introductory status as a living source of guidance than a text of ceremonial rather reverence alone?
questions.urdu: قرآن کو صرف رسم کے طور پر پڑھنے کے بجائے زندہ ہدایت کا ذریعہ کس بیان سے بہتر ظاہر کیا گیا ہے؟
options: Its guidance is activated when its principles shape thought, conduct, and decision-making
Its completeness means human reflection is unnecessary once verses are recited
Its authority applies mainly to devotional settings, not to moral judgment in daily life
Its chief value lies in preserving sacred language, even if conduct remains unchanged
questions.explanation: Last verified on 08-05-2026
